import React from "react"; import { VerticalTimeline, VerticalTimelineElement, } from "react-vertical-timeline-component"; import SchoolIcon from "@mui/icons-material/School"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import StarIcon from "@mui/icons-material/Star"; import Flip from "react-reveal/Flip"; function EducationJourney() { return (
Educational Journey Experience Journey Technical Journey Project Journey

Academic Journey
} >

UNIVERSITY DIPLOMA IN BIG DATA & DATA SCIENCE

University of Montpellier, France

Advanced studies in Data Science, Big Data technologies and Python-based data analysis.

} >

MASTER'S DEGREE IN COMPUTER SCIENCE

University of Montpellier, France

} >

TELECOMMUNICATION ENGINEERING DEGREE

Ecole Supérieure Polytechnique d'Antananarivo, Madagascar

Engineering curriculum focused on telecommunications, computer networks and information systems.

} />
); } export default EducationJourney;
